• Procedural world generation with tile‑based mining, building, and upgrades.
  • Multiplayer support via MQTT, host election, chat, admin panel, and trading.
  • Responsive UI includes mobile controls, minimap, HUD gauges, and customizable texture packs.
    Game.init()
    Sound.updateEngine(speed, drilling)

This code creates a 2‑D mining game where players explore a randomly generated map, mine ores, and manage resources. It handles movement, drilling speed based on tier, heat, explosions, and a full UI with HUD, chat, and shop. Multiplayer is managed through MQTT with host fallback and admin tools, while custom textures and settings are persisted locally.
